entries.source: "What should I be careful not to romanticize?"
entries.value: "Que dois-je éviter de romantiser ?"

entries.source: "What were your real options at this moment?"
entries.value: "Quelles étaient vos vraies options à ce moment-là ?"

entries.source: "What would people in your time assume that modern readers might miss?"
entries.value: "Qu’est-ce que les gens de votre époque supposeraient et que les lecteurs modernes pourraient manquer ?"

entries.source: "What would your critics say about your choices?"
entries.value: "Que diraient vos critiques de vos choix ?"

entries.source: "Which parts of your story are well documented?"
entries.value: "Quelles parties de votre histoire sont bien documentées ?"

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: un critique ;

entries.source: a modern historian;
entries.value: un historien moderne ;

entries.source: a primary source excerpt to evaluate.
entries.value: un extrait de source primaire à évaluer.

entries.source: a rival;
entries.value: un rival ;

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: Une réponse historique utile de l’IA devrait avoir deux niveaux.

entries.source: AI historical conversation can help when it is handled carefully.
entries.value: IA historical conversation can help when it is handled carefully.

entries.source: AI roleplay
entries.value: Jeu de rôle IA

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: une personne ordinaire touchée par la décision ;

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Demandez à l’IA d’indiquer l’incertitude.

entries.source: Character voice plus evidence notes
entries.value: Voix du personnage avec notes de preuves

entries.source: Continue the route
entries.value: Continuer l’itinéraire

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Les dates et les résumés comptent, mais les apprenants ont souvent besoin d’entrer dans la situation humaine : ce que les gens croyaient, les choix qu’ils voyaient, les limites qui les façonnaient et ce qu’ils ne pouvaient pas savoir.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: Par exemple, un apprenant qui étudie la démocratie peut parler avec Ambedkar, puis demander à Source Critic d'évaluer un discours ou un passage constitutionnel. Un apprenant qui étudie une ville peut commencer avec Geography Explorer pour comprendre le lieu, puis passer à une conversation historique.

entries.source: Good guardrails for students
entries.value: De bons garde-fous pour les élèves

entries.source: Historical roleplay can make context, choices, and ideas easier to remember when it separates imagination from evidence.
entries.value: Le jeu de rôle historique peut rendre le contexte, les choix et les idées plus faciles à retenir lorsqu'il distingue l'imagination des preuves.

entries.source: Historical roleplay is especially powerful when learners compare perspectives. After speaking with one figure, ask for another point of view:
entries.value: Le jeu de rôle historique est particulièrement puissant lorsque les apprenants comparent les perspectives. Après avoir parlé avec une figure, demandez un autre point de vue :

entries.source: History becomes more memorable without pretending uncertainty has disappeared.
entries.value: L'histoire devient plus mémorable sans prétendre que l'incertitude a disparu.

entries.source: History is easier to remember when it feels inhabited.
entries.value: L'histoire est plus facile à retenir lorsqu'elle semble habitée.

entries.source: Learning history by talking to historical figures with AI
entries.value: Apprendre l'histoire en parlant à des figures historiques avec l'IA

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Séparez les affirmations formulées dans le rôle des notes de preuve.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Commencez par Talk to a Historical Person pour une conversation guidée par une figure. Utilisez Time Travel pour une expédition dans un lieu et une époque. Lisez le guide Talk to a Historical Person ou les prompts et la boucle d’étude Time Travel si vous voulez un flux de travail plus structuré.

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: Parler à une figure historique n’est pas un accès magique au passé. C’est un format d’apprentissage.

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus preuves creates a better learning surface.

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to preuves.

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: Ce type de questionnement transforme l’histoire d’une liste en un contexte.

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: The IA should separate character from preuves. It can réponse in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps mémoire.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: The format works because it lets apprenants ask questions such as:

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: The goal is not to make the IA the authority. The goal is to make apprenants ask better historical questions.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: The promise is not that IA can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from preuves.

entries.source: The safety rule
entries.value: La règle de sécurité

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: La deuxième couche est la note de preuve. Elle doit indiquer quand quelque chose est directement documenté, largement interprété, contesté ou reconstruit pour l’apprentissage. C’est la partie qui protège l’exactitude.

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: Les questions les plus fortes ne sont pas des questions de culture générale. Ce sont des questions de contexte.

entries.source: The useful part of historical roleplay
entries.value: La partie utile du jeu de rôle historique

entries.source: These questions help the learner see history as a set of pressures and interpretations rather than a costume drama. They also keep the AI honest. The more the learner asks about evidence, limits, and perspective, the less likely the session is to become fantasy wearing a famous name.
entries.value: Ces questions aident l’apprenant à voir l’histoire comme un ensemble de pressions et d’interprétations plutôt qu’un drame costumé. Elles gardent aussi l’IA honnête. Plus l’apprenant pose des questions sur les preuves, les limites et la perspective, moins la séance risque de devenir une fantaisie portant le nom d’une personne célèbre.

entries.source: Try prompts like:
entries.value: Essayez des prompts comme :

entries.source: Use historical AI roleplay with three rules:
entries.value: Utilisez historical AI roleplay with three rules:

entries.source: Use it for comparison
entries.value: Utilisez it for comparison

entries.source: Verify important facts with trusted sources, textbooks, or teacher-provided materials.
entries.value: Vérifiez les faits importants avec des sources fiables, des manuels ou des documents fournis par l’enseignant.

entries.source: What choices were available?
entries.value: Que choices were available ?

entries.source: What did their society assume?
entries.value: Que did their society assume ?

entries.source: What did this person care about?
entries.value: Que did this person care about ?

entries.source: What to ask a historical figure
entries.value: Que to ask a historical figure

entries.source: What would modern readers misunderstand?
entries.value: Que changerait modern readers misunderstand ?

entries.source: Which parts are well documented and which parts are uncertain?
entries.value: Quelle parts are well documented and which parts are uncertain ?

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Vous pouvez essayer ce format dans Talk to a Historical Person. Si vous voulez comprendre le contexte plus large avant de rencontrer une personne, utilisez Time Travel pour visiter une période, examiner les contraintes, puis demander quels choix les gens avaient réellement.
